title: Frog AI project goals and capabilities
content: Frog AI is presented as an open-source personal AI agent project focused on autonomous task planning, real execution, long-term memory, and dynamic plugin generation. Its described capabilities include breaking down tasks, operating on local systems through tools like the filesystem and shell, managing goals over time, attempting self-repair when execution entry points fail, and extending itself by generating new tools as needed. The project is positioned as more than a chat assistant, aiming instead to plan, execute, remember, and improve within a local environment.
